MeraLabh.

About MeraLabh

Simplifying Indian government benefits and welfare schemes for every household.

Our Mission

Millions of Indian households qualify for central and state government healthcare, housing, and social welfare programs, but often struggle to understand complex eligibility guidelines and application procedures.

MeraLabh was created to bridge this information gap. We break down official government policy documents into simple, easy-to-understand guides, interactive eligibility pre-check tools, and clear document checklists.

Editorial Principles & Standards

  • Fact-Checked Information: All eligibility criteria and document lists are verified against official government releases.
  • No Hidden Costs: MeraLabh is 100% free to access. We never charge citizens for viewing scheme guides or using pre-check calculators.
  • Clear Disclaimers: We maintain complete transparency regarding our status as an independent informational website.

Get in Touch

Have feedback or suggestions for our welfare guides? Contact our editorial team at support@meralabh.com.

MeraLabh.

MeraLabh is a public-facing information portal that simplifies Indian government scheme rules to help everyday citizens understand their benefits.

Official Support

Official PM-JAY national helpline operates 24/7 for beneficiary queries:

14555

Disclaimer: MeraLabh is an independent informational website and is not affiliated with the National Health Authority, the Ministry of Health and Family Welfare, or any state or central government. The official portal is located at pmjay.gov.in.
